category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a TCP/IP packet repeater; official homepage describes Stone as a TCP/IP repeater supporting TCP, UDP, SSL, HTTP proxying, and IPv6.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stone; official homepage title is stone version 2.4.
docs_sources: Official homepage is also the best official documentation surface, with features, release links, and usage examples.
repo_sources: Official homepage links a CVS repository for stone snapshots; the linked CVS URL is the official source-control reference.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage feature list identify TCP/UDP repeating, SSL, HTTP proxy, and IPv6 support.
